name: Xbox 360 Racing Wheel v2 (XInput HID)
notes: 101-byte descriptor. Source: DJm00n/ControllersInfo xusb_wheel2. 16-bit wheel + 16-bit Z (combined accel/brake) + 10 buttons + hat. Routes through hidmaestro_xusb.inf XUSB companion (matches xbox-360-wired path); no xinputhid driver mode (would force 16-button gamepad layout, breaking subtype fidelity).
